title: Trace ping_l2 canary and auth failures
description: Reproduce ping_l2 on ARM64 and x86_64 Native64 while tracing the idle canary and the two preceding lichen_l2 authentication failures (-200). Determine whether malformed/auth-failed RX handling performs the corrupting write.
acceptance_criteria: Retain commands, hashes, cross-architecture logs, packet/auth context for both -200 failures, and watchpoint/call-stack evidence identifying the corrupting writer or separating auth failure from canary corruption.
